evidence.source_title: In All But Name: The Iranian Regime's (De Facto) Lobby in the West
evidence.description: Hoover Institution report details extensive Parsi-Zarif email exchanges revealed during the Dai v. NIAC lawsuit, including arranging meetings between Zarif and U.S. Congress members.
Zarif told the Iranian parliament that during his UN tenure he established contacts with anti-Bush politicians and that Parsi and NIAC were his 'main partners in the early stages of this campaign.'
In April 2006, Zarif provided Parsi with a copy of the alleged 2003 Iranian 'grand bargain' offer, which Parsi then released to the press.

editorial_notes: This is the most documented NIAC-regime link. Former FBI associate deputy director Oliver Revell stated these activities would require FARA registration.
